name: Cornish Pasties
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Boneless Top Round Steak, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
2 to 3 Medium Potatoes, peeled, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl combine round steak, potatoes, carrots, onions, parsley, salt and pepper. Mix well. Add butter and toss to coat. Set aside.
2. For pastry, combine flour and salt in a mixing bowl. Cut in shortening until mixture forms pea-size crumbs. Sprinkle with water, 1 tablespoon at a time. Toss lightly with a fork until dough forms a ball. Do not over-mix. Divide dough into fourths.
3. Roll out one portion of the dough into a 9 inch circle. Transfer to a greased baking sheet. Mound about 1 1/4 cups of meat filling on half of the circle.
4. Moisten edges with water. Fold dough over mixture and press edges with fork to seal. Repeat with remaining pastry and filling.
5. Cut slits in the top of each pasty. Brush with beaten egg, if desired.
6. Bake at 375°F for 50-60 minutes or until golden brown.
